description: Clean and analyze the federal College Scorecard dataset from /home/ga/Documents/college_scorecard.csv in WPS Spreadsheet. Filter the data to include only rows where STABBR is 'PA', PREDDEG is 3, and neither GRAD_DEBT_MDN nor MD_EARN_WNE_P10 are 'PrivacySuppressed' or 'NULL'. Transfer this filtered data to a new sheet named 'PA_Analysis'. In the 'PA_Analysis' sheet, create a new column 'Debt_to_Earnings' calculated as GRAD_DEBT_MDN divided by MD_EARN_WNE_P10. Sort the data by MD_EARN_WNE_P10 in descending order and highlight the top 5 school names in the INSTNM column with a yellow background. Save the resulting workbook to /home/ga/Documents/PA_College_ROI.xlsx.
